channel.title: Starmer Watch — Pressure Index
channel.description: Composite pressure index, top news, and market signals for Keir Starmer's leadership.

item.title: Pressure Index 63/100 (elevated)
item.description: Public pressure bloc is above the modeled 81 MP trigger. Pressure Index 63/100 (elevated). Polymarket's top Starmer-exit signal is 31.5%.

item.title: Guardian (Open Platform): Minister defends Mandelson file redactions and says documents to be released in June – UK politics live
item.description: Minister defends Mandelson file redactions and says documents to be released in June – UK politics live

item.title: BBC Politics: Second batch of Mandelson files won't be published this month
item.description: Second batch of Mandelson files won't be published this month

item.title: LabourList: Andy Burnham's statement in full after Makerfield by-election selection
item.description: Andy Burnham's statement in full after Makerfield by-election selection

item.title: LabourList: Andy Burnham confirmed as Labour's Makerfield candidate
item.description: Andy Burnham confirmed as Labour's Makerfield candidate

item.title: Independent UK Politics: Sadiq Khan backs Starmer as he warns Labour rebels against leadership contest
item.description: Sadiq Khan backs Starmer as he warns Labour rebels against leadership contest

item.title: Guardian (Open Platform): Andy Burnham confirmed as Labour candidate for Makerfield byelection
item.description: Andy Burnham confirmed as Labour candidate for Makerfield byelection

item.title:
Bluesky · @stephenkb.bsky.social: in 2010 ministers said phase 1 of High-Speed 2 (from Old Oak Common to Birmingham) would be finished by 2026
now the completion date has been pushed back to between 2036 and 2039
with the final leg to Euston not set...
item.description:
in 2010 ministers said phase 1 of High-Speed 2 (from Old Oak Common to Birmingham) would be finished by 2026
now the completion date has been pushed back to between 2036 and 2039
with the final leg to Euston not set...

item.title: Independent UK Politics: Streeting will expose ‘human shopping trolley’ Burnham, say allies of ex-health secretary
item.description: Streeting will expose ‘human shopping trolley’ Burnham, say allies of ex-health secretary

item.title: BBC Politics: Burnham confirmed as Labour candidate in Makerfield
item.description: Burnham confirmed as Labour candidate in Makerfield

item.title: Independent UK Politics: Politics latest: Burnham confirmed as Labour’s Makerfield by-election candidate in make-or-break battle with Reform
item.description: Politics latest: Burnham confirmed as Labour’s Makerfield by-election candidate in make-or-break battle with Reform
